entities.name: BETA-CAROTENE
entities.description: A carotenoid dominant in orange-red and orange sweetpotato cultivars

entities.name: ZEAXANTHIN
entities.description: A carotenoid rich in light-yellow sweetpotato cultivars

entities.name: LUTEIN
entities.description: The main carotenoid found in white sweetpotato cultivars

entities.description: Genes identified via comparative transcriptome involved in carotenoid metabolism

entities.name: CAROTENOID METABOLISM
entities.description: The biological process controlling the composition and content of carotenoids

entities.description: A method used to identify transcription factors associated with carotenoid content

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTION FACTORS

entities.name: CAROTENOID CONTENT
